children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as provided under subsection (b), the definitions under sections 3502 and 3552 apply to this section through section 3616.

children.heading: .—Administrator
children.label: 1 .—Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator” means the Administrator of General Services.

children.heading: .—Appropriate congressional committees
children.label: 2 .—Appropriate congressional committees
children.text: The term “appropriate congressional committees” means the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs of the Senate and the Committee on Oversight and Reform of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: .—Authorization to operate; federal information
children.label: 3 .—Authorization to operate; federal information
children.text: The terms “authorization to operate” and “Federal information” have the meaning given those term in Circular A–130 of the Office of Management and Budget entitled “Managing Information as a Strategic Resource”, or any successor document.1So in original. Probably should be “terms”.1

children.heading: .—Cloud computing
children.label: 4 .—Cloud computing
children.text: The term “cloud computing” has the meaning given the term in Special Publication 800–145 of the National Institute of Standards and Technology, or any successor document.

children.heading: .—Cloud service provider
children.label: 5 .—Cloud service provider
children.text: The term “cloud service provider” means an entity offering cloud computing products or services to agencies.

children.heading: .—FedRAMP
children.label: 6 .—FedRAMP
children.text: The term “FedRAMP” means the Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program established under section 3608.

children.label: A
children.text: completed a FedRAMP authorization process, as determined by the Administrator; or

children.label: B
children.text: received a FedRAMP provisional authorization to operate, as determined by the FedRAMP Board.

children.heading: .—Fedramp authorization package
children.label: 8 .—Fedramp authorization package
children.text: The term “FedRAMP authorization package” means the essential information that can be used by an agency to determine whether to authorize the operation of an information system or the use of a designated set of common controls for all cloud computing products and services authorized by FedRAMP.

children.heading: .—FedRAMP board
children.label: 9 .—FedRAMP board
children.text: The term “FedRAMP Board” means the board established under section 3610.

children.heading: .—Independent assessment service
children.label: 10 .—Independent assessment service
children.text: The term “independent assessment service” means a third-party organization accredited by the Administrator to undertake conformity assessments of cloud service providers and the products or services of cloud service providers.

children.heading: .—Secretary
children.label: 11 .—Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Homeland Security.
